title: viola × kozo-poljanskii
intro: Viola × kozo-poljanskii is a hybrid plant species in the family Violaceae, resulting from the cross between Viola x koreana and Viola ulginosa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola × kozo-poljanskii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
